pi_items.source: setup_task.sh mounts two volumes: test_volume.hc on /media/veracrypt1 and mounted_volume.hc on /media/veracrypt2.
verifier.py checks for all_dismounted=true and current_mounted_count=0 to confirm no volumes remain mounted.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a synthetic state where 2 VeraCrypt volumes (test_volume.hc and mounted_volume.hc) are explicitly mounted via setup_task.sh. The verifier confirms success when 0 volumes remain mounted (current_mounted_count=0 and no active mount points).
